## Epic 1 — Core Mechanics (#15)

**Dependency:** #11, #12, #13, #14
**Est. Effort:** Medium

### Goal
Write chapter 06 — Core Resolution Mechanics as a polished AsciiDoc chapter.

### Chapter Structure
1. **The Core Roll** — 3d6 + Attribute + Skill + Modifiers
2. **Success Tiers** — Weak (1-6), Standard (7-12), Strong (13-18+)
3. **Critical Hits** — Three natural 6s, bonus effects table
4. **Fumbles** — Three natural 1s, complication table
5. **Always Hit Philosophy** — Why attacks always connect, how damage tiers work
6. **Difficulty & Modifiers** — When and how to apply modifiers
7. **Opposed Rolls** — Contested actions, ties
8. **Worked Examples** — Combat attack, skill check, social persuasion, spell casting
9. **Quick Reference** — Summary table of all resolution mechanics

### Success Criteria
- Chapter covers all resolution scenarios (attacks, skills, opposed, magic)
- At least 3 worked examples with narrative context
- Probability sidebar for DAs (what are the odds of each tier?)
- All xref links to dependent chapters are correct
- Builds without AsciiDoc errors

### Tasks
- [ ] Draft chapter 06 content following the structure above
- [ ] Create probability table (3d6 distribution with common modifiers)
- [ ] Write the always-hit sidebar explaining the design philosophy
- [ ] Write critical hit and fumble d6 tables
- [ ] Create worked examples with narrative setup
- [ ] Build and fix any AsciiDoc errors
- [ ] Cross-reference to: attributes (ch03), skills (ch07), combat (ch13), magic (ch10)
